title: Residual privacy E2E scrapes an empty vector before creating a real observation
source: current-session disposable-stack reproduction and package-order control

createdViaParent.expansionReason: Active runtime exposes no runSubagent/agent tool; bugfix-fastlane is not a top-level-runtime-required mode, so bubbles.workflow (dispatched by bubbles.iterate) executes each phase owner's contract inline. implement is the committed 8ac848e1 fix; test/regression were executed live this session with real evidence (LEG_A_EXIT=0 isolated order-independence proof + full assistant package 40 PASS); simplify/stabilize are bounded direct reviews; security/validate/audit carry prior operator-attested specialist provenance.

executionHistory.summary: Root-cause fix committed in 8ac848e1 (+31/-6 in tests/e2e/assistant/legacy_privacy_e2e_test.go): TestLegacyResidualTelemetry_LiveMetricsExposeBucketsOnly now loads the live retirement stack, sends a real authenticated retired-command turn (unique turnID via time.Now().UnixNano()), asserts HTTP 200, then scrapes the canonical /metrics and requires sampleCount>0 with the exact closed {command,user_bucket} label set; the prior empty-bucket zero-sample allowance (if val=='' { continue }) is removed. Test-only change; no production metric declaration, policy, schema, deployment, release-train, or secret surface touched (smackerel SST no-defaults respected).

Current-session live e2e on a disposable stack (no foreign stack evicted; good-neighbor). Isolated order-independence proof: ./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-package assistant --go-run '^TestLegacyResidualTelemetry_' -> --- PASS (19.55s cold-start, first-and-only test), ok 19.577s, LEG_A_EXIT=0. As the sole test it must materialize its own observation before scraping, so the cold-start GREEN directly proves order independence (non-tautological). Targeted units GREEN: ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run 'LegacyRetirement|PrometheusResidual' -> 29 PASS, UNIT_EXIT=0. Evidence in report.md.

Full assistant e2e package = 40 PASS; the residual test (0.02s warm, late package position) + every neighboring legacy-retirement product flow GREEN, which with the isolated cold-start GREEN proves order independence in both positions. The only 2 failures are the SAME pre-existing unrelated build-environment failure (TestIntentReplayE2E_* in intent_replay_test.go -> replay CLI go build fails with 'error obtaining VCS status: exit status 128 / Use -buildvcs=false') in a different subsystem, outside this change boundary, not caused by this change (working tree packet-only), owned by concurrent spec069 deterministic-e2e work (G051 class; DI-075-001-01). No product regression; no findings to route.

n/a with provenance. The fix reuses the existing live helpers (loadLegacyRetirementNoticeLiveStack, waitLegacyRetirementNoticeReady, postNoticeAssistantTurn, scrapeMetrics) already present in the same package; it adds one real precondition turn plus a sampleCount>0 / closed-label-set assertion and removes the empty-bucket allowance. No new type, abstraction, indirection, helper, or sink registry introduced. Nothing to simplify.

n/a with provenance. Bounded stability review: test-only change; zero Docker/Compose/container-lifecycle/schema/NATS/migration/production changes; the disposable stack is torn down cleanly on exit (good-neighbor, confirmed in leg-a and leg-b teardown output); deterministic and collision-free (unique turnID via time.Now().UnixNano()); idempotent across repeated runs. No shared-fixture coupling introduced.
